channel.title: r53 on focaaby's Note
channel.description: Recent content in r53 on focaaby's Note

item.title: Automatically validating the multiple SAN through DNS validation within multiple hosted zone by using CloudFormation template
item.description: Summary ACM support automatically renews DNS-validated certificates[1]. In this article will go through how to request a public certificate with multiple Subject Alternative Names(SAN)[2], which included the domain name in a public hosted zone and a private hosted zone. Steps Create a public hosted zone, and record the hosted zone id. Create a CloudFormation template with following YAML file. --- AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09' Description: Test Resources: MyPrivateHostedZone: Type: AWS::Route53::HostedZone Properties: Name: dev.
